body_txt: A character has the ability to swallow items and store them in their stomach, typically way more than what would realistically be able to fit in there , up to and including items larger than their entire body, all without any visible change to their outward appearance . Usually they can also bring the items back up on command, and can somehow choose the exact item they want to bring up despite carrying around fifty things. Either that, or they can't choose, and are subject to an Overly Long Gag where they have to keep coughing up increasingly strange items until finally getting the right one by luck. Whatever is funnier for the current situation . Handy and unlikely to be found by frisking, if quite disgusting. The acidic action of digestive juices rarely come into play; the character will be able to swallow a note written on a piece of paper and cough it up hours or even days later completely intact and legible (if a bit soggy). The weight of the objects hardly seems to matter either; the character will be able to walk around with an object weighing 200 pounds in their stomach without any problems, but as soon as they cough it up into their arms they will be dragged to the ground by its weight and unable to budge it (which begs the question of how it got in their stomach in the first place if they couldn't lift it to their mouth in order to swallow it ). Naturally, such characters tend to be Extreme Omnivores . They might not even be storing all that stuff on purpose, and only ate it because they were hungry. See also Swallow the Key . Compare Caged Inside a Monster , Getting Eaten Is Harmless , Protection in Mouth and Treasure Chest Cavity . For objects stored in the other end of the digestive tract, see Ass Shove . For objects stored in the head, see Cranium Compartment .
